text.title: trade-off-decision-matrix Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trade-off-decision-matrix as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Accepting the matrix winner without checking if top-2 scores are within 5% of each other.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A margin of 3-5% on a weighted matrix often means the criteria weights are wrong, not that one option is clearly better. Flag ties and revisit weight rationale with stakeholders.

failure-mode.description: Letting one agent both generate options and score them.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An agent scores its own ideas higher (selection bias). Use separate subagent roles for option generation, scoring, and red-teaming.

failure-mode.description: Cargo-culting: citing "FAANG uses X" without analyzing trade-offs in your context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Your team size, budget, regulatory environment, and hiring market may be entirely different. Always ask for trade-offs in your context, not theirs.
